{{Infobox location
| name = Titan Force headquarters
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Force headquarters]] is in shambles.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Titan Force headquarters]] is located inside [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Titan Force headquarters]] is located on a moon that was swallowed by [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
